title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kid, Unknown person #3, Law, Big Mom as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I can just get it a little further away...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Letting it fall on the capital...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm? is someone calling for me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, we're counting on you to deal with them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Bet you felt that one, HAG!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You wait for me to use my finisher, then you swoop in with a flashy move to take the credit for yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In that case, you go first next time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: and leave the final blow to me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There won't be anything left of that old bat once I hit her with my Trump card!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh? What comes after the bull attack? A hippo? Maybe an elephant?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up!! Like I'm gonna tell you what I'm packing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those shockwaves hit me from the inside out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll have to exchange some life to bring you Bones back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IN ALL SERIOUSNESS, I NEED TO TELL YOU SOMETHING... PANT... PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'LL BE OUT OF STRENETH AFTER THIS ROUND...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: my next attack will be my last...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I CAN'T AFFORD TO LET IT MISS,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just told you to quit giving me orders!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 48 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
